creator: commit-hook@FreeBSD.org
text:
A commit in branch main references this bug:

URL: https://cgit.FreeBSD.org/ports/commit/?id=ccca9304d3d204d75f00f731d0d70470fe55aaef

commit ccca9304d3d204d75f00f731d0d70470fe55aaef
Author:     Gabriel M. Dutra <0xdutra@gmail.com>
AuthorDate: 2023-01-07 16:47:09 +0000
Commit:     Fernando Apesteguía <fernape@FreeBSD.org>
CommitDate: 2023-01-08 18:37:06 +0000

    devel/atlantis: Update to 0.22.2

    ChangeLog: https://github.com/runatlantis/atlantis/releases/tag/v0.22.2

     * chore: updating slack invite link
     * Improve plan summary performance
     * docs: Explicit restrictions of atlantis user apply to the --data-dir flag
     * deps: tf 1.3.7
     * fix(deps): update module golang.org/x/text to v0.6.0
     * chore: enable renovate gomodUpdateImportPaths
     * fix(deps): update module golang.org/x/term to v0.4.0
     * fix(deps): update module github.com/google/go-github/v48 to v49
     * chore(deps): update ghcr.io/runatlantis/testing-env docker tag to v2023
     * docs: add Google Cloud module to deployment
     * fix: markdown renderer use ExecutableName instead atlantis
     * docs: Add api-secret flag
     * chore: release v0.22.2

    PR:             268798
    Reported by:    0xdutra@gmail.com (maintainer)

 2 files changed, 6 insertions(+), 7 deletions(-)
